summary: Code review verification of EV Charging removal, real weigh station alerts, and fresh user defaults. UI testing blocked by Firebase auth loading issue (app stuck on splash screen).

ui_bugs.issue: App stuck on 'Syncing route history...' loading screen - Firebase auth loading state not resolving

action_items: CRITICAL: Investigate Firebase auth loading issue - app stuck on splash screen preventing UI testing
The loading state from useFirebase() hook is not becoming false, blocking app initialization
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED Fix 1: PoiIcon.tsx line 433 - getPoiCategory() returns 'excluded' for EV-related POIs (Tesla, ChargePoint, Electrify America, etc.)
VERIFIED Fix 2: NavigationView.tsx line 5289 - nearbyPois filter excludes category === 'excluded' from rendering
VERIFIED Fix 3: NavigationView.tsx lines 5320-5322 - popup HTML filters EV-related amenities using regex
VERIFIED Fix 3: PoiDetailModal.tsx line 133 & 139 - amenities filter removes EV-related entries in detail modal
VERIFIED Fix 4: NavigationView.tsx lines 2395-2425 - Weigh station alerts now use real POI data (finds weigh_station POIs within 3 miles) instead of fake halfway-point simulation
VERIFIED Fix 5: App.tsx lines 318-328 - loadLocal() returns fallback=0 for new users without localStorage data
VERIFIED Fix 6: userStorage.ts lines 62-68 - Migration checks hasGlobalData and _global_data_claimed_by, new users skip migration and get fresh defaults
VERIFIED Fix 7: MapControls.tsx lines 139-140 - DOT Weigh Stations and Certified Scales still present in filter menu
VERIFIED Fix 8: NavigationView.tsx line 6334 - Brand icon check uses 'excluded' instead of 'ev_charging'

success_rate.frontend: Code review: 100% verified | UI testing: BLOCKED by Firebase auth issue

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 code fixes verified via code review. UI testing blocked by Firebase auth loading issue - app stuck on splash screen 'Syncing route history...' after guest login. The loading state from useFirebase() hook is not resolving to false. Previous iteration (72) had no such issue. May be a transient Firebase connectivity issue or a regression in auth handling.

fix_1_ev_charging_excluded.details: getPoiCategory() returns 'excluded' for Tesla, ChargePoint, Electrify America, Blink Charging, EV Charging, Electric Vehicle

fix_2_poi_filter_excludes_excluded.details: nearbyPois filter checks category === 'excluded' and returns false

fix_3_amenities_filter_popup.details: Popup HTML filters amenities using regex: /(ev\s*charg|electric\s*vehicle|tesla|supercharg|chargepoint|electrify|blink\s*charg)/i

fix_3_amenities_filter_modal.details: Amenities filter in detail modal uses same regex to remove EV-related entries

fix_4_real_weigh_station_alerts.details: Weigh station alerts now find actual weigh_station POIs within 3 miles using getPoiCategory() instead of fake halfway-point simulation

fix_5_fresh_defaults.details: loadLocal() returns fallback value (0) when no localStorage data exists for new users

fix_6_migration_claimed_check.details: Migration checks hasGlobalData and _global_data_claimed_by - new users skip migration entirely

fix_7_filter_menu_weigh_scales.details: DOT Weigh Stations (id: weigh_station) and Certified Scales (id: cat_scale) present in filter menu

known_issues.firebase_auth_loading: App stuck on splash screen - Firebase auth loading state not resolving. This blocks UI testing but code changes are verified.
known_issues.gemini_api_key: Gemini API key reported as leaked - voice guidance falls back to native TTS. Non-blocking issue (known from previous iterations).

mocked_apis.none: No mocked APIs - all integrations are live
